creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry for the delay.  It looks like an update to the latest HEAD was causing panics on my box so I reverted my build box back to a boot environment from two weeks ago.  The 9.x builds were fine but I ran through my usual automated runs successfully on the following.  Thanks for the clean patch and for taking care of the port!

9.3-RELEASE-p30      amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p30      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p24     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p24     i386
10.2-RELEASE-p7      amd64
10.2-RELEASE-p7      i386
11.0-CURRENT r291461 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r291463 i386
